change_request: Add server-side API route to save form submissions to data/leads.json, wire contact form to POST to it, and replace competitor contact info in contact-section
acceptance_criteria: app/api/leads/route.ts POST saves lead with firstName lastName email phone message submittedAt to data/leads.json returns 400 on missing required fields
GET endpoint returns all saved leads
contact-section.tsx form POSTs to /api/leads with loading and error states
competitor phone and email in contact-section replaced with placeholders
data/leads.json added to .gitignore and data/.gitkeep committed

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by adding the necessary API routes, updating the contact form, and replacing competitor contact info.

risks: app/api/leads/route.ts:readLeads - Potential file read errors if the file is malformed
app/api/leads/route.ts:writeLeads - Risk of data loss if file write fails
components/contact-section.tsx:handleSubmit - Potential UI issues if error handling is not robust

llm_analysis.notes: The code handles missing required fields and provides error feedback in the UI, but null inputs are not explicitly checked.
New API endpoints are added without affecting existing contracts.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add unit tests for API endpoints and integration tests for form submission.

overall.summary: The implementation meets the change request requirements and adds necessary functionality. However, testing is lacking and should be addressed.
